title: A Ghost Ship and a Living Skeleton: Key Exchange
description: In the Thriller Bark storyline, this section centers on Whitebeard, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #3, Perona as the scene develops across pages 9–12.
scene: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Whitebeard, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #3, focusing on the immediate stakes of a ghost ship and a living skeleton: key exchange.

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: Maybe when you touch these ghosts,

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: On top of not having bodies,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Those were on the ship, too...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The problem is... who is behind it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hey, let's eat our lunch here!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: An old person with major injuries!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Show them how Dange- Rous zombies are!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I see, so they want to fight.

summary: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Whitebeard, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #3, focusing on the immediate stakes of a ghost ship and a living skeleton: key exchange.
